use tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};
use rand::Rng;

async fn fetch_with_retry(url: &str) -> Result<String, reqwest::Error> {
    let client = reqwest::Client::new();
    let max_retries = 5;
    let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
    // GOOD: exponential backoff with jitter
    for attempt in 0..max_retries {
        match client.get(url).send().await {
            Ok(resp) => return resp.text().await,
            Err(e) => {
                if attempt < max_retries - 1 {
                    let base = 100 * 2u64.pow(attempt as u32);
                    let jitter = rng.gen_range(0..base / 2);
                    sleep(Duration::from_millis(base + jitter)).await;
                } else {
                    return Err(e);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    unreachable!()
}
